---
name: "\U0001F680 Feature request"
about: Suggest an idea, an autonomous path, or a new control layout
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when my autonomous routine misses the Reef because it doesn't use vision.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. (e.g. "Add a PathPlanner event marker to shoot on the move", or "Map the operator's right bumper to index the game piece").

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Mechanism targeted**
- [ ] Swerve Drive
- [ ] Arm / Elevator Setpoints
- [ ] Autonomous / GhostManager
- [ ] Dashboard / AdvantageScope

**Additional context**
Add any other context or sketches about the feature request here.
